title: Recovery ω-cycle: .githooks/pre-commit deletion verify+restore from HEAD

context.trigger: Earlier parallel ω-cycle batch: a concurrent agent racially deleted .githooks/pre-commit. Commit-grouping agent attempted restore via 'git checkout HEAD --' but orphan-commit agent reported it still showing as deleted in working tree (out of scope for that agent).
constraints: DO NOT modify .githooks/ contents — only restore from HEAD if missing

axes.name: pre-restoration state verification

evidence.ls_dir: ls: /Users/ghost/core/nexus/.githooks/: No such file or directory

axes.finding: Discrepancy CONFIRMED: HEAD contains .githooks/pre-commit (mode 100755 executable, blob b28ca97c), but working tree has the ENTIRE .githooks/ directory missing (not just the file). Earlier 'git checkout HEAD --' restoration claim by commit-grouping agent did NOT take effect — file remains deleted at this cycle's start.

axes.name: restoration action
axes.finding: Single restore command executed cleanly, no stdout/stderr emitted (expected for git checkout success). Restore targeted directory (not just file) to capture any other .githooks/* entries HEAD might track (turns out HEAD only has pre-commit, file count = 1).

axes.name: post-restoration state + integrity verification

evidence.ls_dir: drwxr-xr-x 3 ghost  staff   96 Apr 26 08:23 .  /  -rwxr-xr-x 1 ghost staff 2944 Apr 26 08:23 pre-commit
evidence.file_type: Bourne-Again shell script text executable, Unicode text, UTF-8 text

axes.finding: Working tree now matches HEAD: .githooks/ directory present, pre-commit file restored with mode 0755 (executable), size 2944 bytes, type bash script. git status clean for .githooks/ scope. File count in .githooks/ = 1 (matches HEAD ls-tree).

axes.name: pre-commit hook syntax + functional smoke check
axes.finding: Bash syntax parse PASSES (bash -n exits 0, no syntax errors). File is executable (mode 0755). Hook is ready to run on next commit. No --no-verify bypass used in this cycle — restoration was a pure git checkout, no commit was made by this cycle, so hook bypass was never invoked.

summary.scope_respected: .githooks/ only — no other working-tree files touched
